final:
module RefModule(
    input A,
    input B,
    input VPWR,
    input VGND,
    output SUM,
    output COUT
);// Instantiate a half-adder module or provide logic for half-adder functionality
    assign SUM = A ^ B;     // Sum is the XOR of A and B
  wire temp1_A = A;
  wire temp2_B = B;
  assign COUT = temp1_A & temp2_B;    // Carry out is the AND of A and B

endmodule
